{{Infobox concept
| name = Fallen Sword
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Fallen Sword Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Sola Kalter]], known as the Fallen [[Sword]], is an independent agent recognized for her long-standing crusade against the [[Iron Legion]]. A mysterious figure, she is characterized by her exceptional compatibility with [[Aethertech]] weaponry, a trait that has sustained her solo campaign. She wears masterwork gray combat armor that resembles an advanced version of standard [[Galactic Union]] gear, featuring a reflective green visor. In combat, she utilizes various high-powered tools, including a specialized [[Aethertech weapon]] called [[Worldslayer]]—described as a collection of crimson razors—and a [[force-blade]]. Her capabilities are significant enough to crumble the massive shields of a [[Grand Hive]]. While her motivations remain an enigma to many, she is considered one of the premier powers in the galaxy.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola]] utilizes the codename Fallen [[Sword]], a title that has become famous among the populace and is used by civilians to address her. Appearing as a tall figure clad in gray powered armor with a reflective green visor, she operates as an independent agent driven by a personal crusade against the [[Iron Legion]]. During her raids on [[Iron Legion]] [[Hives]], she utilizes an [[Aethertech weapon]] to carry out her mission.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Fallen Sword]] is a codename used by [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Fallen Sword]] is a tall figure wearing gray powered armor with a reflective green visor.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Fallen Sword]] is currently raiding an [[Iron Legion Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Fallen Sword]] is a name or title used by civilians to address [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17">''The Captain'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Fallen Sword]] is an independent agent with a personal crusade against the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Fallen Sword]] is a famous individual.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Fallen Sword]] is a title held by [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19">''The Captain'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Fallen Sword]] is equipped with an [[Aethertech weapon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c43">''The Captain'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Queen Shyrax]] intends to sharpen the [[Fallen Sword]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sola Kalter]] is known as the [[Fallen Sword]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax addresses [[Fallen Sword]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fallen Sword]] is a title or name used by an interlocutor with [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Fallen Sword]] is a character or entity that can be sent to [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Fallen Sword]] is dedicated to killing the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An image of a tall figure in gray powered armor appeared next to Horizon, with visor glistening a reflective green. “The Fallen Sword,” she said.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“She is in the midst of raiding an Iron Legion Hive…”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Tell me, Fallen Sword. What do you fight for?”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
